caption: A blonde woman is positioned against a textured purple background, wearing a black t-shirt with the white text "WHO'S IN YOU" partially visible across the chest. She wears a small, beige headset microphone that curves toward her mouth. In the initial moments, she looks directly forward with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, she turns her head slightly to her right and begins to speak, her mouth opening and closing. Her head then returns to a more central position, though she continues to look slightly to the side while talking. Throughout the sequence, she remains in a stationary seated position, with the focus entirely on her upper body and head movements against the solid colored backdrop.
